claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: The homepage states, "As we sunset the Humanloop platform, we will continue to work closely with our customers to make their transition as smooth as possible," indicating the platform is being discontinued rather than promoting a value proposition.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage does not contain a link to the pricing page, only links to the Migration Guide and Media Kit.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The documentation is accessible without login, but the demo requires booking a demo.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: We’ve created a comprehensive export tool that downloads all your Humanloop data in a structured format.
